channel.title: CV on HomePage of Zhenyu Ma
channel.description: Recent content in CV on HomePage of Zhenyu Ma

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Zhenyu Ma 13331705980 | mazy0403@outlook.com Under Postgraduate 丨Algorithm Research Intern refer: Chinese; English EDUCATION Tongji University Aug 2022 - Mar 2025 CDHK Vehicle Master Jilin University Aug 2018 - Jul 2022 Vehicle Engineering Bachelor PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE Supported by the National Key R&D Program of China under Grant (No2022YFB2502900). Sep 2022 - Present Utilizing unsupervised reinforcement learning, developing an autonomous driving reinforcement learning multitasking decision-making paradigm that improves decision-making levels by 20%~40% and training speeds by 30%~50% compared to the DDPG baseline.
